description: Read-only MCP server for OpenEMIS v5 — 645 resources, 24 playbooks, natural-language queries

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.tixuz/openemis

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your OpenEMIS instance (e.g., https://demo.openemis.org/core)
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: OpenEMIS API key (issued by the OpenEMIS admin)
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to log every tool call and result as JSONL. OFF by default. Results contain tenant PII — enable only on instances you own.
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_LOG_VERBOSE

environmentVariables.description: Path to write verbose JSONL log. If empty and OPENEMIS_LOG_VERBOSE=1, logs go to stderr.
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_LOG_FILE
